# AgentUtils

> One API key. Agent-native utilities. https://agentutils.dev

## Authentication

All endpoints require `x-api-key` header with key starting with `au_`.
Create key at https://agentutils.dev/dashboard after signup.

## Quick Start

```
curl -H "x-api-key: au_YOUR_KEY" https://agentutils.dev/api/health
```

## Tools

### File Host — Ephemeral file hosting
Ephemeral file hosting
- POST /api/file-host — Upload a file — body:  (multipart, field: "file")
- GET /api/file-host/{id} — Retrieve a file

### Dead Letter Queue — Capture and retry failures
Capture and retry failures
- POST /api/dlq — Capture a failure — body: { agentName: string, taskType: string, payload: any, error: string, retryWebhook?: string }
- GET /api/dlq?status=VALUE&page=VALUE&limit=VALUE — List failures
- GET /api/dlq/{id} — Inspect failure (full payload)
- DELETE /api/dlq/{id} — Dismiss failure
- POST /api/dlq/{id}/retry — Retry — forward payload to webhook

### Human-in-the-Loop — Pause agents for human approval
Pause agents for human approval
- POST /api/checkpoint — Create checkpoint (agent sleeps) — body: { agentName: string, taskDescription: string, state: any, webhookUrl: string }
- GET /api/checkpoint — List checkpoints
- GET /api/checkpoint/{id} — Poll checkpoint status
- POST /api/checkpoint/{id}/resume — Approve or reject checkpoint — body: { action: "approve|reject", reason?: string }

### Agent Shield — PII redaction and hydration (Pro+)
PII redaction and hydration
- GET /api/shield — Shield info
- POST /api/shield/clean — Redact PII from text — body: { text: string }
- POST /api/shield/hydrate — Restore original PII values — body: { text: string, sessionId: string }

### AgentVerify OTP — Temporary phone numbers for verification. Virtual numbers blocked by WhatsApp, Google, Meta, and major crypto exchanges. Works for niche platforms and internal systems. (Pro+)
Temporary phone numbers for verification. Virtual numbers blocked by WhatsApp, Google, Meta, and major crypto exchanges. Works for niche platforms and internal systems.
- POST /api/otp — Provision temporary phone number — body: { countryCode?: string }
- GET /api/otp — List active OTP sessions
- GET /api/otp/{id} — Poll for OTP code
- DELETE /api/otp/{id} — Cancel OTP session

### Notification Router — Email notifications for agents
Email notifications for agents
- POST /api/notify — Send an email notification — body: { message: string, priority?: "urgent|normal|low", to?: string, subject?: string, metadata?: object }
- GET /api/notify?status=VALUE&priority=VALUE&limit=VALUE&offset=VALUE — List notification history
- GET /api/notify/{id} — Get notification detail

### Audit Log — Compliance-grade audit trail for agent actions
Compliance-grade audit trail for agent actions
- POST /api/audit — Log an audit event — body: { agentName: string, action: string, target?: string, metadata?: object, severity?: "debug|info|warn|error" }
- GET /api/audit?agentName=VALUE&action=VALUE&severity=VALUE&limit=VALUE&offset=VALUE — List audit entries
- GET /api/audit/{id} — Get audit entry detail

### KV Store — Persistent key-value storage for agents
Persistent key-value storage for agents
- PUT /api/kv — Set a key-value pair — body: { key: string, value: any, ttl?: number }
- GET /api/kv/{key} — Get value by key
- DELETE /api/kv/{key} — Delete a key

### Rate Limiter — Token-bucket rate limiting for agent workflows
Token-bucket rate limiting for agent workflows
- POST /api/rate-limit/check — Check rate limit — body: { key: string, limit: number, windowSeconds: number }
- POST /api/rate-limit/reset — Reset rate limit counter — body: { key: string }

### Webhook Inbox — Temporary endpoints to capture incoming webhooks
Temporary endpoints to capture incoming webhooks
- POST /api/webhook — Create a webhook inbox — body: { label: string, forwardUrl?: string, ttl?: number }
- GET /api/webhook — List webhook inboxes
- GET /api/webhook/{id} — Get inbox and captured payloads

### Agent Form — Create forms for humans, collect structured responses
Create forms for humans, collect structured responses
- POST /api/form — Create a form for humans — body: { title: string, fields: array, webhookUrl: string, ttl?: number }
- GET /api/form/{id} — Get form status and responses

## Rate Limits

- Free: 500 calls/mo, 5MB files, 1h retention — $0/mo
- Builder: 10,000 calls/mo, $0.002/call overage, 25MB files, 12h retention — $19/mo
- Pro: 100,000 calls/mo, $0.001/call overage, 50MB files, 24h retention — $49/mo
- Enterprise: Unlimited, 500MB files, 72h retention — $0/mo

## OpenAPI Spec
Full machine-readable spec: https://agentutils.dev/api/docs

## Response Format
All endpoints return: `{ success: boolean, data?: any, error?: string, code?: string }`
